notes: Mostly used in singular. 'Atmungen' is rare and used in medical/technical contexts.

sentences.german: Die Atmung des Patienten war flach und unregelmäßig.
sentences.english: The patient's breathing was shallow and irregular.

sentences.german: Tiefe Atmung kann helfen, Stress abzubauen.
sentences.english: Deep breathing can help reduce stress.
